headline: Top S&P500 movers in Monday's session

headline: The Upside Debate: UnitedHealth's Consistency vs. Centene's Comeback
summary: UNH's steady execution and diversified model face off against CNC's turnaround bid as cost pressures and policy shifts reshape upside potential.
